case_title: SF CITY PARKING LLC ET AL VS. ROMAN MICLAT NABONG

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SF CITY PARKING LLC CAVDAR, YILDIRAY AS TO DEFENDANT NABONG, ROMAN MICLAT

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-16-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JAN-22-2019 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF CAVDAR YILDRAY IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF SF CITY PARKING, LLC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY CAVDAR YILDIRAY, MANAGING DIRECTOR/OWNER. DEFENDANT ROMAN MICLAT NABONG IS PRESENT. PER THE PLAINTIFF, THE PARTIES REACHED A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT PRIOR TO THE HEARING. IF THERE ARE NO APPEARANCES AT THE JAN 22, 2019 HEARING, MATTER TO BE CONTINUED ONE MORE TIME TO MAY AND IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE MAY 2019 HEARING THE CASE IS TO BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-22-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAY-28-2019 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE MAY 2019 HEARING THE MATTER DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS PER SETTLEMENT AGEEMENT. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED OF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED.
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,025.00 FILED BY SF CITY PARKING LLC CAVDAR, YILDIRAY AS TO DEFENDANT NABONG, ROMAN MICLAT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-16-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SF CITY PARKING LLC
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO SF CITY PARKING LLC ON 01/12/19. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - VACANT - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-30-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT NABONG, ROMAN MICLAT
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
